app-about-text: I have experience in mathematical modeling of optimization problems and design of optimization algorithms, such as heuristics, metaheuristics, and matheuristics. I also have experience in software development with a focus on web applications. B.Sc. in Information Systems from Universidade Federal dos Vales do Jequitinhonha e Mucuri, M.Sc. and D.Sc. in Electrical Engineering from Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais. Currently, my research focuses on the design of mathematical formulations and heuristics methods for mixed integer programming problems. I am interested in subjects as operations research, combinatorial optimization, heuristics and metaheuristics, and computational intelligence. I have knowledge of C/C++, Java SE/EE, JavaScript, Python, R and MATLAB. I'm passionate about computer programming, operations research, new technologies, books, Rock'n'Roll, and meeting new people!
app-education-bsc-university: Federal University of the Mucuri and Jequitinhonha Valleys
app-education-bsc-details-1: Bachelor's Thesis: Multiobjective approach for vehicle routing problem with delivery and optional pickup (in Portuguese).
app-education-bsc-details-3: Co-Advisor: Prof. Luciana P. Assis, D.Sc.
app-education-msc-details-1: Master's Thesis: An algorithm based on differential evolution for solving combinatorial optimization problems (in Portuguese).
app-education-msc-details-3: Co-Advisor: Prof. Jaime A. Ramírez, D.Sc.
app-education-dsc-details-1: Doctoral Dissertation: Scheduling maneuvers for the restoration of electric power distribution networks.
app-education-dsc-details-3: Co-Advisor: Prof. Eduardo G. Carrano, D.Sc.
app-work-1-organization: Federal Center for Technological Education of Minas Gerais
app-work-1-details: Lecturer on the subjects Introduction to computing programming, Web development, and Database systems in Computer Engineering and Computer Technician courses. Deputy Head of Dept. of Informatics, Management, and Design (2021-2022). Deputy Coordinator of the Technical Course in Informatics (2019-2020).
app-work-2-organization: Operations Research and Complex Systems Lab., UFMG
app-work-2-details: I was responsible for developing mathematical formulations and algorithms for solving the problem of scheduling and routing teams for maneuvering switches on power restoration of electric networks. This work was part of an R&D project for developing an integrated fault management system for Ceron Energisa, a Brazilian company of generation, distribution, and transmission of electricity.
app-work-3-details: I developed matrix formulations for tree traversal algorithms and graph drawing, which extended to linear constraints in optimization problems. I was also responsible for creating a web application using Java EE and MATLAB to present a network reconfiguration tool developed by ENACOM team.
app-skills-programming-value: C/C++ (advanced), Java (advanced), JavaScript (advanced), Python (intermediate), MATLAB (intermediate), R (basic)
app-skills-technologies-value: Node.js, Express.js, Java EE, Spring Framework, RESTful Web Services, Git, Linux
